Home / Products / Lightning Arresters — Copper Bonded, Pure Copper & ESE
Lightning Arresters

Lightning Arresters — Copper Bonded, Pure Copper & ESE

Bombay Earthing House manufactures and supplies a complete range of lightning air terminals — from simple conventional spike arresters to advanced Early Streamer Emission (ESE) systems. All products are designed to intercept lightning strikes and route the discharge safely to the earthing system.

Request Quotation View Specifications
Specifications

Technical specifications

All lightning arrester types

</div>

<h3 style="font-size:18px;margin-bottom:16px;">1. Copper Bonded Lightning Arrester</h3>
<p style="font-size:13.5px;margin-bottom:16px;">Comprises a copper core coated onto a steel core for conductivity and strength. Includes hardware for installation and grounding, ensuring safe dissipation of lightning current.</p>
<div class="table-wrap"><table class="specs"><caption style="font-family:Space Grotesk,sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:13px;color:#fff;background:var(--blue-deep);padding:10px;text-align:left;">Copper Bonded Lightning Arrester</caption><thead><tr><th>Ball Dia (mm)</th><th>Rod Length (mm)</th><th>Rod OD (mm)</th><th>No. of Spikes</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td>30</td><td>1000</td><td>14</td><td>5</td></tr><tr><td>30</td><td>1200</td><td>14</td><td>5</td></tr><tr><td>30</td><td>2000</td><td>14</td><td>5</td></tr><tr><td>30</td><td>3000</td><td>14</td><td>5</td></tr></tbody></table></div>

<h3 style="font-size:18px;margin:32px 0 16px;">2. Pure Copper Lightning Arrester</h3>
<p style="font-size:13.5px;margin-bottom:16px;">A Copper Lightning Spike Arrester mounted on top of a building and electrically connected to the ground through a wire or earthing copper strips, to protect the building in the event of a lightning strike.</p>
<div class="table-wrap"><table class="specs"><caption style="font-family:Space Grotesk,sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:13px;color:#fff;background:var(--blue-deep);padding:10px;text-align:left;">Pure Copper Lightning Arrester</caption><thead><tr><th>Ball Dia (mm)</th><th>Pipe Length (Inch)</th><th>Pipe OD (mm)</th><th>No. of Spikes</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td>42</td><td>1200</td><td>25</td><td>5</td></tr><tr><td>62</td><td>1200</td><td>25</td><td>5</td></tr><tr><td>85</td><td>1200</td><td>25</td><td>5</td></tr><tr><td>100</td><td>1200</td><td>25</td><td>5</td></tr><tr><td>150</td><td>1200</td><td>25</td><td>5</td></tr></tbody></table></div>

<h3 style="font-size:18px;margin:32px 0 16px;">3. ESE (Early Streamer Emission) Lightning Arrester</h3>
<p style="font-size:13.5px;margin-bottom:16px;">ESE Lightning Arresters provide advanced protection by emitting a triggering impulse to capture lightning strikes earlier than conventional systems. Made from corrosion-resistant materials, they offer long-lasting and reliable performance in all weather conditions.</p>
<div class="grid cols-2" style="gap:24px;margin-bottom:20px;">
  <div class="table-wrap"><table class="specs"><caption style="font-family:Space Grotesk,sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:13px;color:#fff;background:var(--blue-deep);padding:10px;text-align:left;">ESE Air Terminal</caption><tbody><tr><td style='font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;'>Type of Terminal</td><td>Electroatmospheric</td></tr><tr><td style='font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;'>Standard</td><td>NFC 17-102/2011</td></tr><tr><td style='font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;'>Current Withstand</td><td>10/350µs – 100 & 200 kA</td></tr></tbody></table></div>
  <div></div>
</div>
<div class="table-wrap"><table class="specs"><caption style="font-family:Space Grotesk,sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:13px;color:#fff;background:var(--blue-deep);padding:10px;text-align:left;">Protection Radius (meters) by Height</caption><thead><tr><th>Height (m)</th><th>Level 1 (m)</th><th>Level 2 (m)</th><th>Level 3 (m)</th><th>Level 4 (m)</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td>2</td><td>32</td><td>34</td><td>39</td><td>43</td></tr><tr><td>3</td><td>47</td><td>52</td><td>58</td><td>64</td></tr><tr><td>4</td><td>63</td><td>69</td><td>78</td><td>86</td></tr><tr><td>5</td><td>79</td><td>86</td><td>97</td><td>107</td></tr><tr><td>7</td><td>79</td><td>87</td><td>98</td><td>108</td></tr><tr><td>9</td><td>79</td><td>88</td><td>99</td><td>109</td></tr><tr><td>10</td><td>79</td><td>88</td><td>99</td><td>109</td></tr></tbody></table></div>

<h3 style="font-size:18px;margin:32px 0 16px;">4. Bi Metallic Clamp</h3>
<p style="font-size:13.5px;margin-bottom:16px;">Bi Metallic Clamps serve the purpose of connecting aluminum and copper tapes while establishing a protective barrier against corrosion between these two metals — eliminating the need for soldering, riveting, or wrapping.</p>
<div class="table-wrap"><table class="specs"><caption style="font-family:Space Grotesk,sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:13px;color:#fff;background:var(--blue-deep);padding:10px;text-align:left;">Bi Metallic Clamp</caption><tbody><tr><td style='font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;'>Material</td><td>Copper & Aluminium</td></tr><tr><td style='font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;'>Suitability</td><td>25 – 30 mm</td></tr><tr><td style='font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;'>Purpose</td><td>To connect aluminium & copper conductors</td></tr></tbody></table></div>

Need a custom specification or bulk quote?

Our engineering team responds within 24 hours with a detailed quotation.

India's trusted manufacturer, supplier, stockist and exporter of copper bonded earth rods, pipe electrodes, lightning arresters and earthing accessories — serving 550+ clients worldwide.
